name: cure-voicer
author: Cure Voicer Contributors
description: Private, local-first desktop dictation for macOS and Windows.

scripts.lint: oxlint src tests e2e scripts electron.vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build:macos-icon && npm run build:macos-asr && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.pack:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.pack:win:portable: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.pack:win:nsis: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
